message:
Remove unused imports from test regression and telemetry scripts

- check_test_regression.py: removed unused imports
- test_telemetry_dashboard.py: removed unused imports, simplified

No functional changes; flagged by static analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
